decks.name: The Alekhine Defense as Black
decks.description: A Black repertoire for the Alekhine Defense, drilled one position at a time: every card is a position with exactly one book move to find. Built from 3,000,000 rated games (Lichess database 2026-06, ratings 1600-2200): opponent replies branch by how often they are actually played, covering the most common 90% at each turn, so frequent lines run deep and rare sidelines stay shallow. 79 positions.

decks.name: The Caro-Kann Defense
decks.description: A grinder's Caro-Kann: the original concept cards plus a line trainer built from the canonical opening database (lichess-org/chess-openings). Every named Caro-Kann variation, drilled book-move by book-move from Black's side: Advance, Classical, Exchange, Panov, Fantasy, Two Knights, and the offbeat sidelines. Built from 3,000,000 rated games (Lichess database 2026-06, ratings 1600-2200): opponent replies branch by how often they are actually played, covering the most common 90% at each turn, so frequent lines run deep and rare sidelines stay shallow. 21 positions.
